_comment: Tracks which upstream each derived file came from + the commit it was last synced at. To check for upstream changes worth pulling, see references/upstream-sync.md. JSON chosen for LLM-friendly precise edits.

derived.note: All iron laws (TDD/debugging/verification/receiving-review/worktrees/parallel-dispatch/using-superpowers) folded into resident laws + ponytail philosophy recalibrated (correctness>cost). Folded user's CLAUDE.shared.md universal principles.
HARD-GATE; SCQA+tech spec to .local/ (not committed); tier-aware; Visual Companion frontend-only; Major contested → /debate.
tier-aware depth; Global Constraints from spec §5; Major only full-code + Interfaces; plans to .local/.
merged; tier auto-routes session/subagent (no choice prompt); implementer = CC subagents.
merge-vs-PR always ask; merge flow adds archive + CI monitor; native worktree cleanup first.
merged; default whole-project, --diff for diff-only; §2 contract carve-out (don't flag contracts as over-engineering).
redefined as deferral re-judge: reconcile DEBT:/TODO + spec Non-Goals + plan defers, freshness flag, promotion.
REVIEW'S TRUE UPSTREAM IS codex-plugin-cc (copilot review is ported from it). Sync review against codex-plugin-cc, not copilot.
runtime commands; setup+status merged into status. Originally had a Copilot premium-quota fallback at <5% remaining; removed along with the Copilot backend.
